title: docs: Remove Containerfile and containerignore
body:
These where moved to buildah but because they are useful for podman and
the other tooling they are moved back into the common project.

Partially reverts a9e66ec72b55c7d2a854adca9670f8a336f95fc5

Signed-off-by: Morten Linderud <morten@linderud.pw>

/kind documentation

comments.body:
@Foxboron thanks for the PR!  I see the commit that moved some of these files to [Buildah](https://github.com/containers/common/commit/fc7cb9cf92020cc2f58683bba693f70332a9dca3), but I'm not seeing the PR where they moved back and I don't see the files there atm.

Am I looking with end of day reviewing eyeballs?

I opened a PR here :)
https://github.com/containers/common/pull/905

EDIT:
Me and David asked @rhatdan on IRC/Matrix if moving these was a good idea and he concurred they should probably stay in https://github.com/containers/common. So that is the reason why the PRs are opened :)

@Foxboron missed that PR, thx for the pointer.

@edsantiago the smoke test failure looks like it's related to the removal of these .5.md files and a safety test failing due to that.  Is there some other file that needs to be tweaked?  I looked, but didn't find it...
Do not merge prior to https://github.com/containers/common/pull/905 being merged and potentially a new version of c/common vendored into Buildah.
@Foxboron FYI, https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3745 is making changes to Containerfile.5.md that should be picked up.
@TomSweeneyRedHat if there are no more `.5` files, you need to remove this line https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/7bcca21a282dc42099fcc8883da386a000273d4b/docs/Makefile#L30
Let's hold this off until after 4.0 is released.
@Foxboron Could you fix this PR since the containers/common PR was merged.
@rhatdan I assume you wanted a rebase? If there is anything else missing please do tell :)
You also have to fix the makefile to not install those man pages.
I forgot! Removed the lines relevant for section 5 manpages from the Makefiles :)

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
